name: SCC_CreateSECCDiscoveryRes
title: SCC_CreateSECCDiscoveryRes
syntax: long SCC_CreateSECCDiscoveryRes ( char IpAddress[],dword Port, dword Security )
description: Creates a SECC Discovery Response message for sending. Depending on the function call, the IP Address is either interpreted as an IPv4 address or an IPv6 address.

parameters.name: IpAddress
parameters.description: String representation of the EVSE’s IP address in the usual notation.
